channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: India becomes third-largest in global renewable energy capacity
item.description: India has achieved a remarkable milestone by ranking third globally in renewable energy (RE) capacity, surpassing Brazil. In 2025-26, the country added 55.3 GW of non-fossil power capacity, reaching a...

item.title: CRDB Bank promotes staff health and wellness through nationwide Wellness Day
item.description: CRDB Bank has launched its Wellness Day programme in Mwanza, showing strong commitment to improving the health and well-being of its employees. The launch event took place at Nyamagana Sports Ground, ...

item.title: Coroner’s inquest examines medical assessment before Heather Winterstein’s death in St. Catharines
item.description: During the coroner’s inquest into the death of 24-year-old Heather Winterstein, an emergency medical expert, Dr. Ron McMillan of McMaster University, testified that Winterstein did not display typical...

item.title: Dr Bongani Mncwango joins the IFP as an ordinary member amid plans for municipal growth in KwaZulu-Natal
item.description: Ousted former uMkhonto weSizwe (MK) Party secretary general, Dr Bongani Mncwango, has officially joined the Inkatha Freedom Party (IFP). The IFP confirmed the development during a media briefing in Du...

item.title: Yanga aims to maintain top spot against Pamba Jiji FC in crucial league clash
item.description: Young Africans (Yanga), defending champions of the Mainland Tanzania Premier League, are set to take on Pamba Jiji FC today at CCM Kirumba Stadium in Mwanza. Yanga are leading the table with 41 points...

item.title: President Biden Honors Michael J. Fox with the Presidential Medal of Freedom
item.description: Actor and activist Michael J. Fox has been awarded the Presidential Medal of Freedom by President Joe Biden, recognizing his decades of impactful work both in entertainment and in the fight against Pa...

item.title: Kenya Pipeline Eyes Seventh Continental Title at Africa Volleyball Club Championships
item.description: Kenya Pipeline women's volleyball team is targeting a victory at the 2026 Africa Volleyball Club Championships set to take place in Egypt from April 11 to 24. Coach Geoffrey Omondi has made it clear t...

item.title: Nigeria's Growing Aviation Sector Reaches 10.5 Million Domestic Passengers in 2025, Still Behind South Africa
item.description: Nigeria’s domestic aviation sector saw significant growth in 2025, reaching over 10.5 million passengers, positioning the country as the second-largest market in Africa, just behind South Africa, whic...

item.title: Online Crime Networks Targeting Young People Through Social Media
item.description: The term 'crimefluencer' refers to individuals in decentralised online crime networks who amplify criminal content to gain notoriety and recruit others to commit crimes. These networks, which operate ...

item.title: Traders Wager $950 Million on Oil Price Drop Before US-Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Investors demonstrated a significant lack of confidence in sustained stability within the volatile oil market by placing a massive $950 million bet on falling oil prices just hours before a ceasefire ...

item.title: Three arrested in Bulacan for stealing P25,000 worth of diesel from dump truck
item.description: Authorities in Bulacan arrested three men accused of stealing 200 liters of diesel fuel worth around P25,000 from a dump truck in San Ildefonso early Tuesday morning. The suspects, known only as Jul, ...

item.title: RSPCA rescues over 250 dogs from overcrowded UK home
item.description: The RSPCA has rescued more than 250 poodle-cross dogs from a single residence in the UK, after the situation spiralled out of control due to challenging family circumstances. A photograph taken by a r...

item.title: Report Ranks Apple and Lenovo Lowest for Laptop Repairability
item.description: A new report by the Public Interest Research Group (PIRG) Education Fund, titled “Failing the Fix (2026),” grades the repairability of leading laptop and smartphone brands. The study focuses on how ea...

item.title: NASS committees endorse pipeline security contract, boost oil production
item.description: The joint Petroleum Resources committees of the National Assembly don dismiss three petitions wey dey challenge the pipeline surveillance contract. Dem give Tantita Security Services, security agencie...

item.title: President Samia urges officials to cut fuel use amid global oil price rise
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan has instructed government officials to reduce fuel consumption by limiting unnecessary travel and decreasing the number of official vehicles. This directive comes as Tanz...

item.title: CNN Panel Debate Highlights U.S. Struggle to Reopen Strait of Hormuz Amid Iran Tensions
item.description: On April 8, 2026, CNN's 'NewsNight' host Abby Phillip pressed conservative panelists Scott Jennings and Chris Madel on the unresolved closure of the Strait of Hormuz. The discussion centered on U.S. P...

item.title: Seahawks evaluate top cornerback prospects Brandon Cisse and Colton Hood ahead of 2026 NFL Draft
item.description: As the Seattle Seahawks prepare for the 2026 NFL Draft, they are hosting two of the top cornerback prospects, Brandon Cisse from South Carolina and Colton Hood from Tennessee. The team is conducting i...

item.title: India and Bangladesh to Strengthen Bilateral Ties and Boost Energy Cooperation
item.description: India and Bangladesh are set to take significant steps to improve their relations following a period of tension. The two countries have agreed to resume existing mechanisms to address ongoing issues a...

item.title: Mudavadi Welcomes New UN Resident Coordinator Garry Conille in Nairobi
item.description: On Tuesday, Prime Cabinet Secretary Musalia Mudavadi officially received the credentials of Dr. Garry Conille, the newly appointed United Nations Resident Coordinator in Kenya, at the Railways Headqua...

item.title: Yeng Guiao Calls Gabe Norwood's Jersey Retirement a Fitting Honor for Rain or Shine Legend
item.description: In a recent statement, Rain or Shine Elasto Painters head coach Yeng Guiao expressed his full support for the upcoming retirement of Gabe Norwood's jersey number by the franchise. Guiao described the ...
